g.text: Day 0 — speed to lead (new leads stage)

svg.text: NL-SMS-00 → Call (NEPQ) → NL-SMS-07 (~1hr if no call logged)
If lead responds at any point → WF-11 pauses sequence + owner review
Rotates channels to avoid fatigue — no same channel two days in a row
Call tasks assigned to LM or AM based on source tag
After Day 30 with no response → move to Cold stage → WF-05
